title: Playdough Letter Factory
description: A squishy build game where kids place playdough-like parts onto ghost spots to construct letters and numbers.
learningGoals: Notice letters and numbers as parts made from strokes
Connect spoken construction language with visual forms
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap dough pieces onto ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct dough pieces pop, sparkle, and speak the stroke name; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished builds speak the completed letter or number.
credits: Kaigani; placeholder emoji and text-symbol dough pieces rendered by the shared build-assemble engine. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
